summary: postinstall script exfiltrates host data to attacker-controlled endpoint
details: The package executes postinstall.js automatically on `npm install`. The script imports `child_process`, collects host identifiers (including hostname), shells out to `curl`, and issues `http.request(...)` calls — the canonical install-time host-recon and exfiltration shape. Multiple `curl` invocations alongside hostname collection and an outbound HTTP request fire as a side effect of installing this package, with no advertised purpose justifying outbound network from a postinstall hook.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
